# Support 🌿

Thanks for using **GrowApp**, **CI-Strains-Pro**, or any of the other projects! 

I'm a **solo founder** grinding away in Adelanto, CA, so I appreciate every bit of feedback and every user who finds these tools useful.

### 🛠 Getting Help

**For [GrowApp](https://github.com/Shannon-Goddard/grow_app) users (mobile or web):**
- **Quick questions or feature ideas** → Open an issue in the [grow_app repo](https://github.com/Shannon-Goddard/grow_app) or the [web repo](https://github.com/Shannon-Goddard/growappcannabis.guide)
- **Bug reports** → Please include your Device/OS version, App version (check Settings → About), and steps to reproduce.
- **Strain data corrections** → Best submitted as issues in the [web repo](https://github.com/Shannon-Goddard/growappcannabis.guide) as they sync to the mobile app.

**For [CI-Strains-Pro](https://github.com/Shannon-Goddard/ci-strains-pro):**
- Data questions, corrections, or new verified strains → Open an issue in the [ci-strains-pro repo](https://github.com/Shannon-Goddard/ci-strains-pro).

### 📬 Direct Contact
If you prefer not to open a public issue:
- **Email:** [shannon@loyal9.app](mailto:shannon@loyal9.app)
- **Response time:** I usually reply within 1–3 days. I'm one person, so please be patient — I'm reading every message.

### 💰 Want to Help Keep This Free?
[GrowApp](https://github.com/Shannon-Goddard/grow_app) stays 100% free and ad-free. If the app has saved you time or made your grows better, consider supporting the work:

[![Sponsor Shannon Goddard](https://img.shields.io/badge/Sponsor-Shannon--Goddard-04AA6D?style=for-the-badge&logo=github-sponsors)](https://github.com/sponsors/Shannon-Goddard)

### 🙌 Community
- **Website:** [growappcannabis.guide](https://growappcannabis.guide)
- **YouTube:** Search "GrowApp Cannabis" for tutorials.
